title: Luffy Laughs Against Kaido
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Luffy, Unknown person #5, Yamato, Unknown person #6, Momonosuke as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gramps taught me how to attack without making contact!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna knock you to the bottom of hell!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I didn't mean to drop you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't go dying on me now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Sir Straw hat, we're counting on you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This nightmare won't end unless Kaido is driven from this land!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't let a single one escape!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is only one place those Samurai would go,

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: THEY INTEND TO SAFEGUARD ODEN'S HEIR, MOMONOSUKE!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
